info.title: Agora Marketplace — Supabase Direct
info.description: Direct access to Agora's trust-verified AI agent marketplace database. Search listings, filter by type/category, and get trust scores.

get.summary: Search all AI agents, MCP servers, and skills in the Agora marketplace
get.description: Query the Agora marketplace database. Use PostgREST filter syntax. Returns listings with trust scores, pricing, descriptions, and tags. Always filter by status=eq.active to get published listings only.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Always set to eq.active to get published listings

parameters.name: select
parameters.description: Columns to return. Default returns all useful fields.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter by type using PostgREST syntax: eq.ai_agent, eq.mcp_server, or eq.skill

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Filter by name using PostgREST syntax: ilike.*search_term* for fuzzy search

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Filter by description using PostgREST syntax: ilike.*search_term* for fuzzy search

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Filter by category: eq.security, eq.analytics, eq.performance, eq.general, eq.ai_agent

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: Filter by tags using PostgREST array syntax: cs.{security} means contains 'security'

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: Sort order. Default: trust_score.desc (highest trust first)

price_per_call.description: Price in USD per API call, 0 = free
